TAV / The whole purpose of this subsection is to calcluate the Total Accumulation Value (TAV).  The TAV is ONLY used to calculate the Weighted Average Interest rate (WAIR). The TAV is a simplified projection of how much account value will be in the policy for the next year.  It considers premiums (limited by 7702), loan repayments, loan balance, and Monthly deductions (from the SWAM - Sweep Account Minimum) / bPremTD
